LightningComponentBundle.description: SLDS-style horizontal carousel. Drop child Lightning components into this component in App Builder to show one at a time, or use configured rich-text slides when the slot is empty.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Carousel title
property.description: Shown above the carousel for context and screen readers.

property.name: autoplay
property.label: Autoplay (composition mode only)
property.description: Advances slides automatically when using nested components; pauses on hover or focus.

property.name: autoplayIntervalSeconds
property.label: Autoplay interval (seconds)
property.description: Minimum 3. Used when Autoplay is on.

property.name: slidesJson
property.label: Fallback slides (JSON)
property.description: Used only when no child components are placed inside this component. Array of {title, content} where content is HTML for lightning-formatted-rich-text.

property.name: slidesJson
property.label: Fallback slides (JSON)
property.description: When no nested components exist, optional JSON array of slides with title and HTML content.
